name: Cheese Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Grated Cheese (cheddar or your preferred cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour and baking powder.
3. Add salt and grated cheese to the dry ingredients.
4. Using two spatulas or fingertips, work in the melted butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Gradually add milk, stirring with a fork until a soft dough forms (dough should be slightly sticky).
6. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and gently knead for 30 seconds to avoid overworking it.
7. Pat the dough into an even layer about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Using a teaspoon, drop biscuit-sized portions onto a well-oiled baking sheet (greased with butter or cooking spray).
9. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Transfer to a wire rack and serve hot.
